name: @rozie-ui/command-palette

scripts.typecheck: echo 'meta-pkg: pure-Rozie source; the emitted leaves typecheck individually, the surface gate runs under vitest'

comment:combobox-devdep: D-07/Option A (P75): the 6 @rozie-ui/combobox-<target> published per-target packages are now REAL devDependencies — this is the graduation the prior Option-B note anticipated. Declaring them here makes pnpm symlink them into command-palette/node_modules, which is exactly the surface Plan 02's resolveManifestProducer walks (node_modules UPWARD from dirname(fromFile) = command-palette/src, NOT from resolverRoot). So the authoring/codegen surface — the VR harness, the surface test, and the IDE LSP — now resolves the stable `<components>` specifier `@rozie-ui/combobox/Combobox.rozie` to the PUBLISHED per-target package rather than a vendored sibling (D-05/D-09/D-10). The plain `@rozie-ui/combobox` devDependency is kept alongside for now — Plan 04 removes vendoring, but the raw `.rozie` authoring surface may still transitively need it until that lands.
comment:headless-core-devdep: P3/D-06: the vendored Combobox imports @rozie-ui/headless-core/listCore.rzts (the shared resolver spine). That bare specifier must resolve from this package's location when codegen + the VR harness compile the vendored sibling, so headless-core is a devDependency too (the partial dissolves at compile — zero runtime dep).
comment:vue-mount-devdeps: groupcap-actions.behavior.test.ts (mount-and-drive, the combobox seed-query.behavior.test.ts / group-cap.behavior.test.ts precedent): imports the committed leaf packages/vue/src/CommandPalette.vue and mounts it via plain `vue` createApp/h — @vitejs/plugin-vue transforms the SFC, happy-dom supplies the DOM. Versions mirror @rozie-ui/combobox's devDependencies exactly (already-resolved workspace versions, not new packages).
